generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-based positional sensor capturing crane joint angles, puck coordinates, and trajectory execution metrics for real-time kinematic monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneMotionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion sensor capturing velocity and acceleration data from the gantry crane's movable bridge, hoist, and trolley mechanisms."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneMotionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneOperationalStatusSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring controller commands, error states, and operational status of the gantry crane system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneOperationalStatusDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityCO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-equipped CO2 sensor for real-time indoor air quality monitoring in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityCO2DataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityParticulateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Particulate matter sensor for indoor air quality monitoring, integrated with Raspberry Pi systems."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityParticulateDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor for environmental monitoring in indoor air quality management applications."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor for real-time environmental monitoring in indoor air quality management systems."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance CranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneMotionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneMotionSensor
]

instance CraneOperationalStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneOperationalStatusSensor
]

instance AirQualityCO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityCO2Sensor
]

instance AirQualityParticulateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityParticulateSensor
]

instance AirQualityHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityHumiditySensor
]

instance AirQualityTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityTemperatureSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model describing the gantry crane's motion and dynamics, enabling simulation of movements and interactions with the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicModelingEnabler
]

instance AutomationMLAirQualityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model for geometric and behavioral representation of indoor air quality management systems."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutomationMLEnabler
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation model for greenhouse systems enabling dynamic real-time adjustments in both physical and digital domains."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BehavioralAdaptationEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBHistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured time-series operational data from the physical crane stored in TimescaleDB for analysis and validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted, CraneMotionDataTransmitted, CraneOperationalStatusDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatabaseEnabler
]

instance InfluxDBAirQualityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series database storing structured air quality sensor data for simulation and validation in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityCO2DataTransmitted, AirQualityParticulateDataTransmitted, AirQualityHumidityDataTransmitted, AirQualityTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatabaseEnabler
]

instance PrerecordedGreenhouseData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Pre-recorded environmental data embedded in virtual machine images for greenhouse digital twin simulation and validation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VirtualizationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance KinematicModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom or open-source libraries for developing mathematical models of crane motion and dynamics, supporting simulation and validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance AutomationMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AutomationML framework enabling geometric and behavioral representation of air quality management systems in digital twin models."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualitySimulationService, AirQualityPredictionService
]

instance BehavioralAdaptationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework supporting dynamic real-time adjustments in greenhouse systems through behavioral adaptation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseAdaptationService
]

instance DatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight or open-source database systems for storing and retrieving time-series operational data from physical systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, FaultDetectionService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance VirtualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Virtual machine technology enabling deployment of pre-recorded data and simulation environments for digital twin validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseAdaptationService
]

instance MessageBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ActiveMQ-based message brokering system ensuring synchronization between physical and digital domains through component communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance AzurePipelineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for pipeline execution in air quality management digital twin applications."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualitySimulationService, AirQualityPredictionService
]

instance CADModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source or proprietary CAD software for creating and maintaining 3D models of the gantry crane for digital twin representation."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance SimulationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Physics-based simulators for validating control strategies and digital twin accuracy in crane operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides algorithms or methods for optimizing the crane's movement, energy consumption, or operational efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneTrajectoryOptimizationInsight, EnergyEfficientOperationAction, CollisionAvoidanceAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Collects and stores operational data from the physical crane for analysis, validation, or retrospective studies."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneOperationalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables real-time or historical visualization of the crane's state, performance metrics, and operational data."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateVisualizationInsight, PerformanceMetricsDashboardInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Validates the digital twin's accuracy by comparing its predictions or simulations with real-world data from the physical system."
    DTDFVocab:provides DigitalTwinAccuracyInsight, ModelDiscrepancyDetectionInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors the physical system for faults or deviations from expected behavior, triggering alerts or corrective actions."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, PredictiveMaintenanceAlertAction
]

instance AirQualitySimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates air flow and pollutant dispersion in indoor environments for air quality management."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirFlowSimulationInsight, PollutantDispersionInsight
]

instance AirQualityPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Forecasts virus spread risks and air quality trends using digital twin models."
    DTDFVocab:provides VirusSpreadRiskInsight, AirQualityTrendPredictionInsight
]

instance GreenhouseAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables dynamic adjustments to greenhouse systems based on real-time sensor data and behavioral adaptation models."
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseEnvironmentOptimizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance CraneTrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized trajectories for crane movements to improve operational efficiency and safety."
]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

    base:desc "Forecasted trends in indoor air quality metrics over time."

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control flows from the digital twin to the **Physical Crane** are mediated by the **Control Application**, a Python program that interfaces with the **Physical Crane Interface**. Commands generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service** (e.g., optimal trajectories with zero residual swinging) are transmitted as structured control messages to the crane's controllers. The exact message format is unspecified, but the system implies a deterministic, kinematics-driven command structure. Validation and authentication mechanisms are not explicitly described, though the **Continuous Validation Service** ensures executed trajectories adhere to simulated models, indirectly validating command integrity. Feedback systems are implicit: the **Logging Application** captures real-time crane state data, which is compared against simulated trajectories to detect deviations. Conflict resolution is not detailed, but the **MQTT Broker** facilitates signaling between services, suggesting asynchronous event handling for command prioritization or error recovery. Command execution confirmation is implied via the **Dashboard**, which notifies operators of threshold breaches (e.g., trajectory deviations exceeding acceptable limits)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system exemplars demonstrate an **ad-hoc, component-based orchestration** rather than a standardized constellation. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplifies a **self-adaptive architecture** where both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin exhibit **behavioral adaptation**, coordinated via **InfluxDB (time-series database)** and **ActiveMQ (message broker)** for event-driven communication. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses a **pipeline architecture** on **Microsoft Azure**, integrating **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** services with **AutomationML** for model-driven engineering. The **gantry crane system** (logistics domain) employs the **C4 Model** for architecture visualization, suggesting a **containerized microservices approach** with **modular components** (e.g., control, sensing, actuation) but lacks explicit orchestration frameworks. All exemplars avoid commercial digital twin frameworks, opting for **custom integration patterns** (e.g., virtualization, containerization) to ensure **easy dissemination** and **domain-specific adaptability**. Resource management is implicit, relying on **single-board computers (Raspberry Pi)** and **cloud/VM-based services** for scalability."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral fidelity**, where both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin dynamically adjust based on real-time or prerecorded data. Validation is implied through **prerecorded datasets** in virtual machine images, ensuring reproducibility. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar focuses on **model-driven engineering fidelity**, with **AutomationML-based models** validated via **runtime visualization, simulation, and predictive analytics** for virus spread prevention. Microsoft Azure tools facilitate **data-driven validation**, though explicit methods (e.g., uncertainty quantification, error correction) are not detailed. The **lab-scale gantry crane** exemplar lacks specific fidelity metrics but adheres to **ad-hoc validation approaches**, likely relying on **containerized deployment** for consistency. Uncertainty sources (e.g., sensor noise, model approximations) are not quantified, and no explicit **quality assurance processes** (e.g., calibration protocols, cross-validation) are described in the provided documents."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin’s technical network infrastructure relies on a **TimescaleDB database** (a PostgreSQL extension optimized for time-series data) as the central data repository, connected to services via unspecified protocols. The **MQTT Broker** enables lightweight, publish-subscribe communication between services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, and **Continuous Validation Service**), ensuring low-latency signaling. Network topology is not explicitly defined, but the system’s modular design (C4 container abstraction) suggests a distributed architecture with services communicating over a local or dedicated network. Bandwidth and latency requirements are not quantified, though real-time kinematic data (e.g., trajectory metrics) imply low-latency constraints. Reliability and redundancy mechanisms are not detailed, but the **Continuous Validation Service**’s threshold-based alerts imply fault detection. Security protocols are unspecified, though the use of a dedicated **MQTT Broker** and centralized database suggests controlled access points."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin’s deployment infrastructure is not explicitly described as cloud/edge/on-premise, but the system’s components (e.g., **TimescaleDB**, **Grafana Dashboard**, and Python services) suggest an **on-premise or edge deployment** due to the lab-scale, real-time nature of the gantry crane operations. Computational requirements are moderate: the **Trajectory Generator Service** and **Simulation Service** rely on kinematic models, while the **Logging Application** and **Continuous Validation Service** require continuous data processing. Storage demands are driven by the **TimescaleDB database**, which archives time-series crane state data. Scalability mechanisms are not mentioned, but the modular C4 architecture implies potential horizontal scaling for services like the **MQTT Broker** or **Dashboard**. Deployment models are not specified, though the Python-based services and TimescaleDB suggest containerization (e.g., Docker) or virtualization. Availability/reliability assurance is implied by the **Continuous Validation Service**’s real-time monitoring and operator alerts, but no explicit redundancy (e.g., failover) is described."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems exhibit **limited horizontal integration** with external systems, primarily relying on **domain-specific technologies** and **ad-hoc protocols**. The **GreenhouseDT** integrates with **InfluxDB (time-series database)** and **ActiveMQ (message broker)** for internal data exchange but lacks explicit interoperability standards for external systems. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling and **Microsoft Azure tools** for pipeline implementation, implying **cloud-native integration** but no standardized protocols for enterprise systems. The **gantry crane system** (logistics domain) does not document external integrations, though its **C4 Model-based architecture** suggests potential for **modular extensions** via containerization. No evidence of **OPC UA, MQTT, or other industrial interoperability standards** is provided. Dependencies are localized to **single-board computers, virtual machines, or cloud services**, with no mention of **cross-Digital Twin or enterprise system integration patterns**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The **Air Quality Management** exemplar adheres to **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling, a standardized format for engineering data exchange. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar uses **InfluxDB** (a time-series database standard) and **ActiveMQ** (a widely adopted message broker protocol), though these are not domain-specific standards. Neither exemplar explicitly mentions **certification requirements** or **compliance frameworks** (e.g., ISO, IEC). **Interoperability** is implied through the use of **Raspberry Pi sensors** (common IoT hardware) and **containerization/virtualization** (e.g., VMs, Azure tools), but no formal standards (e.g., OPC UA, MTConnect) are referenced. The **ad-hoc approach** of the exemplars suggests limited adherence to proprietary or industry-specific digital twin standards."
]
